headline: Incyte Completes Acquisition of Vega Therapeutics, a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Star Therapeutics, Expanding its Hematology Portfolio
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., July 06, 2026--Incyte Completes Acquisition of Vega Therapeutics, a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Star Therapeutics, Expanding its Hematology Portfolio
